$comment: Example LPDF_TEXT_ON_DIELINE_PATH finding (F-32). Emitted when a text bbox intersects a dieline-spot stroke bbox — the cutter will physically slice the glyphs. Distinct from LPDF_TEXT_NEAR_FOLD (which is a clearance-distance check); F-32 is on actual overlap. ISO 19593-1 §5.3.
message: 1 text region(s) overlap the dieline 'Dieline' cut path on page 1 — glyphs will be sliced at the cutter
